{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Forged weapons
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Striker Trial]] uses [[Forged]] spears.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
